contract_elements_covered: Analytics proxy /analytics/grafana/ prefix strip + WebSocket + framing rewrite (T-0120)
frozen_boundaries_respected: No public GRAFANA_TRAEFIK_HOST default embed path

dependency_review.notes: Parallel foundation (T-0119/T-0121) before proxy; frontend shell after env contract (T-0122); tests after proxy/frontend; docs last

test_coverage.proxy_integration: T-0127 — reachability, prefix strip, framing headers, WebSocket forward

coverage.criterion: Sidebar Analytics section lists every provisioned Grafana dashboard (Platform Health + dashboards 1–5) with in-app routes under financegnome host
coverage.notes: Six routes per discovery map (T-0123); Analytics nav group with six in-app links (T-0124); platform-health + cashflow/subscriptions/budgets/portfolio/forecast-horizons

coverage.criterion: User can open each dashboard without leaving financegnome (no target=_blank Grafana tab required for default flows)
coverage.notes: Same-origin proxy (T-0120); kiosk iframe shell without target=_blank (T-0123); CSP frame-src self (T-0126); proxy smoke validates embed path (T-0127)

coverage.criterion: Embedded or proxied views work with omniflow Traefik + auth middleware (or documented operator auth-off dev path)
coverage.notes: Proxy outside JWT stack; anonymous Grafana Viewer behind internal network (T-0120/T-0121); CSP + framing rewrite (T-0126); automated proxy/WS tests (T-0127); Traefik auth + dev bypass documented in user guide (T-0129)

coverage.criterion: Existing React chart pages (Forecast, Wealth, Planning, Subscriptions, Alerts) remain functional (regression)
coverage.notes: Regression tests for five product routes; ECharts primary surfaces preserved per DEC-0057 UX table

coverage.criterion: Wealth page no longer relies on external-only Grafana link as the primary portfolio analytics entry
coverage.notes: WealthPage → /analytics/portfolio in-app (T-0125); VITE_GRAFANA_URL deprecated in env contract (T-0122)

coverage.criterion: Future-chart guideline documented: new product charts added inside financegnome shell (React + API default; Grafana embed exception list)
coverage.notes: User guide future-chart guideline + canonical UX table per DEC-0057

coverage.criterion: Operator guide describes single-URL analytics UX; optional separate Grafana public host not required for acceptance
coverage.notes: Env contract documents embed vars and deprecated external URL (T-0122); operator guide single-URL UX + troubleshooting (T-0129)

advisories.note: AC-3 Traefik auth + iframe runtime proof is operator-host dependent; no dedicated omniflow smoke task (unlike S0010 T-0118). T-0127 automated proxy tests + T-0129 troubleshooting cover plan level; UAT-3 and QA phase must close runtime proof on omniflow or document PASS-with-prerequisites.
T-0127 tasks.md acceptance refs list AC-2 only; coverage map and task description also satisfy AC-3 proxy/WebSocket — refs are understated, not a coverage gap.
No per-dashboard E2E iframe load test for all six slugs in sprint scope; proxy smoke + UAT-1/UAT-2 post-execute acceptable per DEC-0057 decision gate.
DEC-0057 decision gate (anonymous Grafana insufficient → auth-proxy sub-decision) documented in sprint risks and T-0129; execute must stop if omniflow smoke triggers gate — not a plan-verify blocker.

summary.tasks_without_acceptance_ref_note: All tasks T-0119–T-0129 map to at least one AC in tasks.md acceptance refs and coverage map

notes: QA plan-verify 2026-06-02: sprints/S0011/tasks.md acceptance coverage map aligns with docs/product/acceptance.md US-0011; 11/11 tasks mapped; 7/7 AC covered; DEC-0057 contract fully tasked; no gaps or orphans. Approved for /execute.
